title: Week 1: Sonar research: Pydantic AI vs LangChain tradeoffs
content: Pydantic AI: typed structured output, provider-agnostic. LangChain: more ecosystem but heavier. Chose Pydantic AI for agent layer.

title: Week 1: Sonar research: Pydantic AI vs LangChain tradeoffs
content: Pydantic AI: typed structured output, provider-agnostic. LangChain: more ecosystem but heavier. Chose Pydantic AI for agent layer.

title: Week 4: Sonar research: HNSW index tuning for SurrealDB
content: Research: HNSW M=16, ef_construction=200 recommended for 1M vectors. SurrealDB DIMENSION must match embedding model output.

title: Week 3: Sonar research: SurrealDB graph query patterns
content: Best practices for SurrealDB graph traversal: use RELATE, arrow notation, and SELECT * FROM table WHERE <-relation<-other.
